what: Write updated hooks configuration to the specified settings file
why: Persists hook edits — user chooses whether to save to shared or local settings

success_handling.criteria: Settings file updated with new hooks section, other keys preserved

error_handling.criteria: JSON.parse throws SyntaxError on the incoming hooks data
error_handling.action: Return error with code INVALID_JSON (don't corrupt the file)

error_handling.criteria: File not found at target path

decisions.rationale: Critical: a broken settings.json breaks Claude Code entirely

decisions.reason: Read-modify-write: update only the hooks key
decisions.rationale: Preserve other settings like permissions, allowed tools, etc.

decisions.reason: Write target specified by caller: shared or local
decisions.rationale: Shared hooks go to settings.json (committed), local to settings.local.json (personal)
